metadata.title: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A to GS++ Mapping
metadata.remarks: Semantic control mapping from ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A to the local BSI OSCAL catalogs 'BSI Methodik Grundschutz++' and 'BSI Stand der Technik Kernel'. The mapping was reviewed against the local ISO/IEC 27002:2022 editions to use the additional purpose and implementation guidance for more precise control alignment. The mapping is authored for machine-readable reuse and does not restate the full target control content. QA review on 2026-05-27 adjusted four overly broad target assignments, added five more precise target controls, and weakened two relationship classifications where the target coverage is partial.

provenance.mapping-description: Human-authored semantic mapping of all 93 Annex A controls to the provided BSI OSCAL catalogs. Governance, compliance, review and ISMS-process controls are primarily mapped to the Methodik catalog. Operational, technical, personnel, physical and lifecycle-oriented controls are primarily mapped to the Kernel catalog. Where a single BSI requirement was too narrow, multiple target controls were grouped into one mapping entry.
provenance.qa-note: Formal consistency checked against JSON and Excel outputs; semantic review used ISO/IEC 27002:2022 interpretation material and BSI target statements/guidance.
